title: Evidence node
description: A specific excerpt drawn from a source that bears on a claim. The claim-to-evidence relationship is expressed by supports/contradicts edges, not by fields here. Carried in an evidence.added event under payload.node. No PRD sketch existed; this is a minimal Phase 1 discovery shape. TOLERANT v0 draft: additionalProperties is permissive.

id.description: Node ID embedding the artifact ID, e.g. evidence:association-board-brief-001:e002.

source_ref.description: Node ID of the source this evidence was drawn from.

excerpt.description: The quoted or paraphrased text taken from the source.

locator.description: Where in the source, e.g. a page, section, row, or timestamp.
